name: explore-broad
description: Broad parallel exploration scouts. Lead delegates scoped probes to scouts; scouts return findings via team_send_message.

members.name: scout-1
members.prompt: Scout: {{TASK}} — focus area A. Report findings via team_send_message to lead. Do NOT make changes.

members.name: scout-2
members.prompt: Scout: {{TASK}} — focus area B. Report findings via team_send_message to lead. Do NOT make changes.

members.name: scout-3
members.prompt: Scout: {{TASK}} — focus area C. Report findings via team_send_message to lead. Do NOT make changes.

members.name: scout-4
members.prompt: Scout: {{TASK}} — focus area D. Report findings via team_send_message to lead. Do NOT make changes.

members.name: verifier-1
members.prompt: Verify scout findings for {{TASK}} via independent quick search. Confirm or refute, report to lead.

members.name: verifier-2
members.prompt: Verify scout findings for {{TASK}} via independent quick search. Confirm or refute, report to lead.
